title: British mod
description: Adds British dishes like beans on toast and a weapon
body:
Adds British items such as dishes and a weapon. Also includes 1 achievment
- British Sword
- Beans on Toast
- Fish and Chips
- Tea

- also adds resources required to craft the items above.

[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) is recommended to view the recipies

Feel free to add this mod to your modrinth modpack
